source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation
source.population: Adults in hospital and community settings with clinical concern for malnutrition or impaired intake.
source.setting: General practice, community, hospital, nutrition, and multidisciplinary assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting unintentional weight loss, poor appetite, altered taste, impaired swallowing, altered bowel habit, reduced intake, BMI and percentage weight loss when measured. It does not calculate risk or generate nutrition support.

items.rationale: The exact screening section supports duration, measured or reported weight loss, appetite, intake, swallowing, bowel symptoms, illness, and functional impact without assigning malnutrition or cause.

source.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with symptoms or signs that may indicate cancer, subject to recommendation-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Primary care recognition, safety netting, investigation, and referral.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected suspicious skin-lesion, safety-netting, and age- or risk-qualified respiratory recommendations; international suspected-cancer pathways require UAE clinician review. source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation
source.population: Adults in hospital and community settings with clinical concern for malnutrition or impaired intake.
source.setting: General practice, community, hospital, nutrition, and multidisciplinary assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting unintentional weight loss, poor appetite, altered taste, impaired swallowing, altered bowel habit, reduced intake, BMI and percentage weight loss when measured. It does not calculate risk or generate nutrition support.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

source.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with symptoms or signs that may indicate cancer, subject to recommendation-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Primary care recognition, safety netting, investigation, and referral.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected suspicious skin-lesion, safety-netting, and age- or risk-qualified respiratory recommendations; international suspected-cancer pathways require UAE clinician review.
